body.title: Wire autonomic rule-enforcement hooks into session startup and pre-commit
body.result: SessionStart hook installed at ~/.claude/settings.json + lab/claudecode/hooks/session-start/igor-env-check.sh. Pre-commit guards shipped as follow-up T-cc-pre-commit-guards (7f27583d).
body.description:
Enforce CLAUDE.md rules via hooks so violations surface before damage: (1) Session-start hook (context-load or cc_bridge) validates Postgres connectivity (error if unreachable) and that IGOR_HOME_DB_URL is set. (2) Pre-commit git hook rejects staged .env, *.db, ~/.TheIgors/* runtime paths, direct writes to decisions_log.dsb, use of `git commit --amend`. Scope: autonomic enforcement via hooks. Files: ~/.claude/settings.json (hook declarations), lab/claudecode/hooks/pre-commit/*.sh. Follows T-cc-admin-consolidation (consolidation provides shared env setup that hooks consume).

test_plan: (1) Attempt to stage .env — pre-commit hook rejects with clear message. (2) Attempt `git commit --amend` — hook rejects. (3) Run context-load with Postgres down — startup hook reports error inline. (4) Normal commit + context-load flow unaffected.
